subcodes.first_line: O ye, the residents of the Kingdom! Strive ye as much as ye can so that the Love of God may become so manifest like unto a (life-like) statue
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اهل ملکوت تا توانید بکوشید تا محبت الله از شدت ظهور مانند مجسمه گردد و در نهایت
subcodes.subjects: @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @spiritual transformation
